title: The Springer-Verlag Book Series Workflow
description: This flowchart illustrates the typical process of publishing a book in a Springer-Verlag series, highlighting the key stages from conception to final publication.
relationships: An Author/Editor submits a Book Proposal
Upon approval, a Contract is signed and the Manuscript is Submitted
The manuscript enters the Production & Typesetting phase
The process culminates in the Final Published Volume
